04 = No; patient offered and declined
05 = No; patient assessed and determined to have medical contraindication(s)
06 = No; not indicated - patient does not meet age/condition guidelines for
influenza vaccine
07 = No; inability to obtain vaccine due to declared shortage
08 = No; patient did not receive the vaccine due to reasons other than those listed in responses 4 - 7 CHAR 2 x x x x
